title: Home
metaTitle: MediSquare Superspeciality Hospital and Research Institute
metaDescription: MediSquare based in Ahmedabad is one of the best superspeciality hospital for oncology, neurology and pediatric nephrology.

cards.title: Medical Oncology
cards.description: Medical oncology is a modality of treatment in cancer care which uses Chemotherapy, Immunotherapy, Hormonal Therapy and Targeted Therapy to treat cancer in an effective manner.

cards.title: Movement Disorders
cards.description: Movement disorders specializes in diagnosis and treatment of neurological conditions causing too much or too little movement. These disorders include Parkinson's disease, Essential tremor, ataxia, dystonia, chorea and tics.

cards.title: Pediatric Nephrology
cards.description: Pediatric nephrology specializes in the diagnosis and treatment of children with a variety of acute and chronic kidney-related disorders like hypertension, hematuria, proteinuria, renal tubular acidosis, nephrolithiasis, glomerulonephritis and kidney failure

items.author: Chinmay Raval
items.text:
"Dr. Ekta Vala is incredible. She is currently treating my dad for his prostate cancer and it’s rare to find a doctor that combines such personal touches and care for a patient. She explains everything to us in a very clear manner. She shows very much confidence and makes sure that my dad feels positive while fighting against the cancer. She keeps excellent communication and always available to answer query at all time.
I highly recommend her to anyone looking for an oncologist."

items.author: Archana Solanki
items.text:
"Just one word for Ekta madam 'amazing'...
She is not only excellent doctor but more than a great human being.. She treats her each patient with personal attention. Understand their pain as well as their psychological condition too. She behaves to patient like friend and motivate patient. Doctors like Ekta madam make that sentence true 'Doctors are God of Earth'. I am very lucky to have Ekta Madam as my oncologist... Thank you madam for everything.. Your personal attention, your concern, everything.."

items.author: Ram Gor
items.text: "Dr. Ekta is one of the best doctor's we have ever come across. My mom is currently being treated under her for the breast cancer which was done with so much personal touch that she felt comfortable and was able to fight her battle without any fear. I would highly recommend her to anyone who is looking for a good cancer specialist."

location.title: Location
location.address: O 201-202, Gala Empire, Opposite Doordarshan Tower, Drive In Road, Gurukul, Ahmedabad - 380 052

appointment.title: Book an Appointment
appointment.subtitle: Share your contact details, along with the concern and PDF file of diagnosis history, if any. We will get back to you as soon as we can.
